title: FunniWeapons
description: Adds multiple new weapons and tools with unique gimmicks and features, including items from Team Fortress 2, Marvel Rivals and more
body:
![FunniWeapons logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cad77cbaba1e8d1661a7de8f5ddaa7fa852d29a4.png)

**FunniWeapons** introduces new survival-friendly weapons with various gimmicks and features. Works in Multiplayer!

Leave feedback here (Google Forms): 
https://forms.gle/JPw38PKH1Pk2D5cx9

# Flamethrowers

Currently, the mod features two main variants of flamethrowers inspired by arsenal from **Team Fortress 2** for you to craft and try out. All flamethrowers passively regenerate ammunition, so you don't need to craft any extra gas for it.

## Flamethrower

![The Flamethower in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9eedd4b97c6ea05b900c75d819dba08e5bb3f88f_0.webp)

![Recipe for the Flamethrower. Iron Block top left, Iron ingot top middle, Redstone Block top right, Illegal Gun Parts middle, Bucket bottom left, Essence of Hope bottom middle, Bucket bottom right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce3ace4b8e255c1950e8b36b8c8ecfae7c9a2608.png)

The **Flamethrower** spews piercing flames upon right-clicking. It has 200 ammo.

![Flamethrower in action](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d58984e33f134ec3030abf46d2326bcea796466_0.webp)

## Dragon's Fury

![Dragon's Fury in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ae8479d69a806e5ce67b4abeb2c2585843fd397.png)

![Recipe for the Dragon's Fury. Iron Block top left, Iron ingot top middle, Redstone Block top right, Illegal Gun Parts middle, Bucket bottom left, Essence of Despair bottom middle, Bucket bottom right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a14a505845f5f47fda5393c57571af2494c09d3f.png)

**Dragon's Fury** is a flamethrower variant which shoots fireballs that deal extra damage to ignited enemies and fire faster upon consecutive hits. It has 40 ammo.

![Dragon's Fury in action](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb7b96515f44290707801962f3af0795da5e83a0.png)

### Enchantments

The flamethrowers are subject to a few exclusive enchantments:

- **Quick Reload** increases the speed at which flamethrower ammo regenerates.
- **Airblast** adds a secondary function to the flamethrowers, allowing them to repel enemies and projectiles upon right-clicking while crouching. Less effective on the Dragon's Fury. Does not work with Mmmph.
- **Mmmph** adds an Ult for the Flame Thrower, tripling the damage output for a short duration. Does not work with Airblast.

# Melee Weapons

**FW** currently has five true melee weapons.

## Delinquent's Daggers

![Daggers in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17914f4b89913e37bd8ac70dd312457e3a8ea6b8_0.webp)

![Daggers recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cfccd8d2c42eebbcf0fb927894a5cee9831b934.png)

The **Delinquent's Daggers** are a pair of agile daggers, inflicting Slowness on hit. Executing a 3-hit combo performs a circular attack, rapidly damaging all enemies near you!

## Half-Zatoichi

![Zatoichi in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb1b8bbe3754ab4067d14874baa4dbdbd2c153a6_0.webp)

![Zatoichi recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1865047042f112c28a534aab6782f0080c5729fa.png)

The **Half-Zatoichi** is a katana, restoring half of your max health upon killing a mob. Any excess healing gets converted to Absorption hearts, rounded up. 

## Lucy

![Lucy in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3feca92e2c5b0f3f37468a8deff459250c7f59a_0.webp)

![Lucy recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1e72bc085fcac0b4fa3707e908ea97d3ba45bc1.png)

Taken directly from Woodie, **Lucy** is an axe. She chops wood really well and is unbreakable. Makes for a great conversation partner!

## Inquisitor's Final Judgement

![Inquisitor in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/694771089c2540baed1799702dc08695c91542ed.png)

![Inquisitor recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c91827458433758e86a6bd39aa8d07b27ec7dc2a.png)

The **Inquisitor's Final Judgement** is a holy stielhandgranate, exploding every mob you hit.

### Ultimate Ability

Upon using the Ultimate, you stop for a second to warm-up before teleporting to random enemies nearby and EXPLODING, SENDING THEM STRAIGHT INTO THE STRATOSPHERE. JUDGEMENT.

## SUEÑO IMPOSIBLE

![Lance in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d610527cbe240e046651c1f22b50faeb85b4f9e1_0.webp)

![Lance recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d747d8b200225660af2e06e39784cccf55f76633.png)

Coming from Limbus Company, The **SUEÑO IMPOSIBLE** is a giant lance. Using it mid-air allows you to dash head-first into an enemy, knocking them back _hard_ depending on your movement speed and giving you a little bonus health to soften the potential fall.

~~...No, you can't fly forever with the Elytra using this. Sorry.~~

# Ranged Weapons

**FW** also features four ranged weapons, functioning distinctly from each other.

## Truth Revolver

![Truth Revolver in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ba782c91ff721dd7b461398ebdb395333ba7fd6.png)

![Recipe for the Truth Revolver, Truth Bullet top left, Absorb Bullet top middle, Lie Bullet top right, Gold Ingot middle left, Essence of Hope middle, Gold Ingot middle right, Illegal Gun Parts bottom middle, Gold Ingot bottom right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/356a3dd05c53f00583e9660f1e52dfe249286326.png)

Inspired by the **Danganronpa** franchise, the **Truth Revolver** fires **Truth Bullets**, **Absorb Bullets** and **Lie Bullets** in that respective order. If a type of bullet is not present in your inventory, the bullet is not fired. The more types of bullets you have, the faster it shoots.

![Truth Revolver firing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/143956ca86c76c75874e9c881b8f541f8804630f.png)

### Bullets

- **Truth Bullets** deal the most damage, but have no special effects.

![Truth Bullet recipe, Gold Nugget middle top, Copper Ingot middle, Gold Nugget middle bottom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d85a5a3e86f868116e1525d04106522d5270a36.png)

- **Absorb Bullets** deal the least damage, but restore your health on hit.

![Absorb Bullet recipe, Gold Nugget middle top, Emerald middle, Gold Nugget middle bottom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/daeef79e3bd1382946a00df235824e7c6df9943b.png)

- **Lie Bullets** deal average damage, but inflict one of three debuffs onto mob hit.

![Lie Bullet recipe, Gold Nugget middle top, Amethyst Shard middle, Gold Nugget middle bottom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/329c8db60d98119df84896578067c65de89bd638.png)

### Enchantments


The Truth Revolver is subject to two enchantments:

- **Vocabulary** decreases the amount of bullets spent, up to 33%.
- **Trigger Happy** shortens the cooldown between shots.

## Roterstern

![Roterstern in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42304e4730cf1457d6abb15b69084c94c1434d81.png)

![Recipe for the Roterstern, Essence of Hope top left, Essence of Hope top middle, Netherite Ingot top right, Essence of Hope middle left, Illegal Gun Parts middle, Essence of Despair middle right, Netherite Ingot bottom left, Essence of Despair bottom middle, Essence of Despair bottom right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4a53321d0d30f22beaf3c16881798526c52f3ca.png)

Winter Soldier's weapon of choice, now in your hands! The **Roterstern** functions identically to it's representation in **Marvel Rivals**.

![HUD element of Roterstern ammo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d0c2358b6b5b68ca80609377a4a54c73ecee4eb.png)

Roterstern has 3 explosive rounds in a clip, quickly firing each of them before reloading.

### Ultimate Ability

Damage dealt charges the **Ult**, a special ability you can trigger by right-clicking while crouching. Once Roterstern's ult is charged, it'll play a sound to alert you.

Upon using the **Ult**, you jump high in the air and get **Slow Falling**. It also automatically reloads all Roterstern ammo and gives you 4 hearts of Absorption.

![Ult user high in the air](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58a7f12692c06b0407c80aa1f104bf01e08a028b.png)

While in the air, right-click again to slam into the direction you're facing, dealing damage and inflicting all affected mobs with **Culling**.

![Ult user slamming into the ground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4ab56d09dc054335296e38aae102c241849672d.png)

**Culling** makes the affected mob instantly perish upon hitting 20% of it's HP and refreshes the user's Roterstern ult, allowing them to potentially cycle Ultimates.

### Enchantments

Roterstern is subject to one enchantment:

- **Ceaseless Charge** increases the duration of Culling by 2 seconds per level, up to 9 seconds.
- **Kraken Impact** increases the percent at which Culling instakills an entity by 10% per level, up to 40%.

## Gas Passer

![Gas Passer in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93581d31c4202e1a1fe164b165f867add7e21c39.png)

![Recipe for the Gas Passer, Straw top left, Handle top middle, Essence of Hope top right, Iron Ingot middle left, Lava Bucket middle, Iron Ingot middle right, Iron Ingot bottom middle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90170fa9a61cc2bd0ea3b72e6380fc80bfbc4150.png)

**Gas Passer** charges with damage dealt. When fully charged, it can be thrown to coat mobs in an area in gas, lighting them alight when damaged. Gas Passer's fire is stronger than normal, piercing armor and effects (except for Fire Resistance).

![Gas Passer in-air](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e805f3d971df6d9c399ed08db26d2dbbb305f228_0.webp)

### Enchantments

Gas Passer can be enchanted with two levels of **Explode on Ignite**. With this enchantment, gas fire also causes a one-time explosion.

![Gas Passer explosion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27124daf862077b219b1ff4f136912aa2861403a.png)

## Playing Cards

![Playing Cards in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90f1bb9aa9154c4bfe8ac75898f6346189542882.png)

![Recipe for the Playing Cards, Essence of Hope top middle, Blank Card middle left, Blank Card middle, Blank Card middle right, Essence of Despair bottom middle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02736125c3bb182598e4a22782d19baea5180725.png)

**Playing Cards** throws 3 horizontal cards.

### Ultimate Ability

Damage dealt charges the **Ult**, a special ability you can trigger by right-clicking while crouching.

Upon using the **Ult**, you get Regeneration and Resistance, along with starting to throw cards in all directions.

![Ult triggering](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af705fcaa412adf643235491ea8cd4c301be11ce.png)

# Cards

**Cards** are a type of item which trigger when a certain condition is met and the item is being held in the off-hand. Currently, four types of Cards are implemented.

## Joker

![Joker card in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e09f5e6497d93d971024d9d2f17cbb265098884_0.webp)

![Recipe for the Joker, Orange Wool top left, Redstone Block top middle, Orange Wool top right, Black Wool middle left, Blank Card middle, Black Wool middle right, Diamond bottom left, Diamond bottom middle, Diamond bottom right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce9a326d0b538855d831e6d0dbcb4ee5ff0360d1.png)

The **Joker** card is triggered upon dealing damage. It quadruples the damage done and then goes on a 30 second cooldown.

![Joker card in effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a03c4579fabc1bb5626bce09a8fbe4f5bd29dbbf_0.webp)

## Hope Cards

![Hope Cards in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6067bc884728a0c408c52b8d705c028869a76063.png)

The **Hope Cards** are a group of cards, consisting of the Truth, Absorb and Lie Cards. When held in the off-hand, they act as an endless substitute for their respective ammunition for the Truth Revolver.

# Materials

## Straw

![Recipe for the Straw, Bamboo middle top, Leather middle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9780ff2ca3c5b6b9c31ac30205f3bc55d038ff7f.png)

## Handle

![Recipe for the Handle, Iron Ingot middle top, Iron Ingot middle left, Stick middle, Iron Ingot middle left, Iron Ingot middle right, Stick bottom left, Stick bottom right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffa9760ee73ced39f5b4f2841713a300c23c9e3e.png)

## Illegal Gun Parts

![Recipe for the Illegal Gun Parts, Gold Nugget top left, Gold Ingot top middle, Gold Nugget top right, Gold Ingot middle left, Gold Ingot middle right, Gold Nugget bottom left, Gold Nugget bottom right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b366e43f7934d75800dd745c130792d4c2a4828.png)

## Essence of Hope/Despair

![Essences](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc5c0f7716d59fccde300b07f3e26a210c2f2be3_0.webp)

Have a small chance of dropping from any mob. Unaffected by Looting.

# Mobs

**FW** currently features one mob.

## The Reaper

![Reaper in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c3ecffca23a26f8ef2f6102dcf5acc2958fb299.png)

Reapers uncommonly spawn in Soul Sand Valleys and chase the player on-sight. They are invisible and almost entirely silent until they get close to their target. Reapers have a bigger chance to drop Essences.

Credit to LogeInMute for the following weapon models: Roterstern, Flamethrower, Dragon's Fury, Lucy, Half-Zatoichi.
